data: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS embedding (id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), space_id UUID NOT NULL, source_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, source_id UUID NOT NULL, source_field VARCHAR(50), text_chunk TEXT NOT NULL, embedding JSONB, embedding_vector VARCHAR(100), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW())
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_embedding_space_type ON embedding (space_id, source_type)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_embedding_source ON embedding (source_type, source_id)
